causes: Failing catalytic converter, oxygen sensor issues, exhaust leaks, engine misfires

Faulty wheel speed sensors, damaged wiring, control module issues

description: Tire Pressure Monitor Sensor Battery Low
causes: Low TPMS sensor battery, replace sensor and check tire pressure
Vacuum leak, MAF sensor, fuel pump, O2 sensor

description: Catalyst System Efficiency Below Threshold Bank 1
causes: Catalytic converter degradation, O2 sensor failure
Ignition system, fuel delivery, vacuum leaks

description: Evaporative Emission Control System Leak Detected (small leak)

description: O2 Sensor Circuit Slow Response (Bank 1 Sensor 1)
causes: Aging O2 sensor, exhaust leak, wiring

description: Evaporative Emission System Leak Detected (large leak)

causes: MAF sensor dirty or failed, air leak

description: Coolant Thermostat (Coolant Temperature Below Thermostat Regulating Temperature)
causes: Stuck open thermostat, low coolant, sensor
